seo_description: Current time in Dhaka, Bangladesh. Bangladesh Standard Time (BST, UTC+6) year-round — no DST. Live clock and time differences for Dhaka.

faq.question: What time is it in Dhaka right now?
faq.answer: Dhaka, Bangladesh uses Bangladesh Standard Time (BST, UTC+6) year-round. Bangladesh does not observe Daylight Saving Time. The IANA identifier is Asia/Dhaka. Dhaka is 30 minutes ahead of Kolkata/India (IST, UTC+5:30) and 1 hour behind Yangon/Myanmar (MMT, UTC+6:30). Dhaka is one of Asia's most populous cities. The live clock above shows the current Dhaka time.

faq.question: What time zone is Dhaka in?
faq.answer: Dhaka, Bangladesh uses Bangladesh Standard Time (BST, UTC+6) year-round. The IANA identifier is Asia/Dhaka. Bangladesh does not observe Daylight Saving Time. UTC+6 is shared with Almaty (Kazakhstan) and Bishkek (Kyrgyzstan). Note: Bangladesh's BST (UTC+6) should not be confused with British Summer Time (BST, UTC+1).

faq.question: Does Dhaka observe daylight saving time?
faq.answer: No. Dhaka, Bangladesh does not observe Daylight Saving Time. Bangladesh uses Bangladesh Standard Time (BST, UTC+6) permanently year-round. Bangladesh briefly experimented with DST in 2009 (moving to UTC+7) but reverted to UTC+6 in 2010 due to public opposition.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Dhaka and London?
faq.answer: Dhaka (BST, UTC+6) is 6 hours ahead of London (GMT, UTC+0) in winter. During UK summer time (BST, UTC+1), Dhaka is 5 hours ahead. Bangladesh does not observe DST.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Dhaka and New York?
faq.answer: Dhaka (BST, UTC+6) is 11 hours ahead of New York (EST, UTC-5) in winter. During US DST (EDT, UTC-4), Dhaka is 10 hours ahead. Bangladesh does not observe DST.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Dhaka and Delhi?
faq.answer: Dhaka (BST, UTC+6) is 30 minutes ahead of Delhi (IST, UTC+5:30). India uses a unique UTC+5:30 offset. Neither country observes DST, so this 30-minute difference is constant year-round. When it is 12:00 PM in Delhi, it is 12:30 PM in Dhaka.
